title: Borscht Stuffed Cured Meat Rolls
description: A twist on traditional Ukrainian borscht, these rolls combine the flavors of the beet-based soup with cured meats and a floral touch.

ingredients.name: Cured meat (such as salami or ham)

instructions: In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the beets, borscht mix, and honey to the pan, stirring to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix the chopped dill and salt and pepper.
Roll out the cured meat to a large rectangle.
Spread the borscht mixture over the meat, leaving a 1-inch border.
Sprinkle the dill mixture over the borscht.
Roll up the meat and slice into 1-inch thick rolls.
Place the rolls on a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
